title: قرار وزاري رقم 306: في شأن قائمة المواد والمنتجات الطبية شبه المراقبة

provisions.title: يلغىأي حكم آخريخالف أويتعارض معأحكام هذاالقرار.
provisions.content: يلغىأي حكم آخريخالف أويتعارض معأحكام هذاالقرار.

provisions.title: صدربتاريخ:24/10/2023م
provisions.content:
ينشرهذا القراربالجريدةالرسميةويعمل بهاعتباراً مناليوم التاليلتاريخنشره.صدربتاريخ:24/10/2023معبدالرحمن بنمحمدالعويسوزيرالصحة ووقايةالمجتمعنشرهذا القرارالوزاري فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم762.ص25.مرفقالقرارالوزاري رقم (306)لسنة 2023 في شأنقائمة الموادوالمنتجاتالطبية شبهالمراقبةMOHAP- LIST OF REGISTERED SCD MEDICINES (Generic name)*1-Any active ingredient(s) under CD or CD-Narcotics if it comes in combinationwith ingredient(s) listed below, it will fall in the more restrictedcategory.
2- Oral dosage form &parenteral of these active ingredients will be considered as SCD. Topicalpreparations of these active ingredients will remain as POM unless otherwisestated.ItemDescription#Acetyldihydrocodeine,(Acetyldihydrocodeine alone isNarcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compoundedwith one or more other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligramsof the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 percent in undivided preparations)1-Acitretin2-Agomelatine3-Alprostadil(parenteral forms only)4-Amitriptyline5-Amisulpiride6-Aripiprazole7-Asenapine8-Atomoxetine9-Baclofen10-Biperiden11-Brexpiprazole12-Bupropion
(Bupropionalone & Bupropion > 90mg/ Naltrexone combination is SCD (in combinationBupropion Hydrochloride ≤ 90mg has been excluded)13-Buserelin14-Buspirone15-Cariprazine16-Chloprostenol17-Chloralhydrate18-Chlordiazepoxidecombinations (not alone)19-Chloroethaneor Ethyl Chloride (spray)20-Chlorpromazine21-Chlorzoxazone22-Citalopram23-Clomethiazole24-Clomipramine25-Clozapine26-Codeine,(Codeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration ofnot more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)27-Cyclobenzaprine28-Desflurane(inhalation solution)29-Desvenlafaxine30-Detomidine(Veterinary use only) solution for injection31-Dexmedetomidine32-Dextromethorphan33-Dextropropoxyphene,(Dextropropoxyphene alone isNarcotic)
(NOT ALONE; For oral usecontaining not more than 135 milligrams of DEXTROPROPOXYPHENE base per dosageunit or with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undividedpreparations, provided that such preparations do not contain any substancecontrolled under the 1971 Convention on Psychotropic Substances).34-Difenoxin,(Difenoxin alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; Containing, per dosage unit, not more than 0.5 milligrams of DIFENOXINand a quantity of atropine sulfate equivalent to at least 5 per cent of the doseof DIFENOXIN).35-Dihydrocodeine,(Dihydrocodeine alone isNarcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compoundedwith one or more other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligramsof the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 percent in undivided preparations)36-Dinoprostone(Delivery system, tablet & Gel)37-Diphenoxylate(Diphenoxylate alone is narcotic)
(NOTALONE; Containing, per dosage unit, not more than 2.5 milligrams ofDIPHENOXYLATE calculated as base and a quantity of atropine sulfate equivalentto at least 1 per cent of the dose of DIPHENOXYLATE)38-DosulepineHCI39-Duloxetine40-Enflurane(inhalation solution)41-Ephedrine42-Escitalopram43-Ethylmorphine,(Ethylmorphine alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentrationof not mor than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)44-Fluoxetine45-Flupenthixol46-Fluphenazine47-Fluvoxamine48-Gallamine49-Haloperidol50-Halothane(inhalation solution)51-Imipramine52-Isoflurane(inhalation solution)53-Isotretinoin(oral form only)54-Lecirelin(Veterinary use only)55-Levosulpiride56-LithiumCarbonate57-Lurasidone58-Maprotiline59-Melitracen60-Mesterolone61-Methocarbamol62-Mianserin63-Milnacipran64-MinaprineChlorhydrate65-Mirtazapine66-Misoprostol(both device & tablet)67-Moclobemide68-Nandrolone(parenteral form)69-Nefazodone70-Nicocodine,(Nicocodeine alone is Narcotic)
NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration ofnot more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)71-Nicodicodine,(Nicodicodeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration ofnot more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)72-Norcodeine,(Norcodeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration ofnot more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)73-Nortriptyline74-Olanzapine75-Opipramol76-Orphenadrine77-Oxytocin78-Paliperidone79-Papaverine80-Paroxetine81-Pholcodine,(Pholcodine alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; When compounded with one or more other ingredients and containing notmore than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosage unit and with a concentration ofnot more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations)82-Prochlorperazine83-Propiram,(Propiram alone is Narcotic)
(NOTALONE; Containing not more than 100 Milligrams of PROPIRAM per dosage unit andcompounded with at least the same amount of methylcellulose).84-Propofol85-Quetiapine86-Reboxetine87-Retigabine(AKA ezogabine)88-Risperidone89-Sertindole90-Sertraline91-Sevoflurane(inhalation solution)92-Somatropin93-Stanozolol94-Sulpiride95-Testosterone(oral & parenteral forms only)96-Tetrabenazine97-Thalidomide98-Thiopentonesodium99-Tizanidine100-Trazodone101-Tretinoin(oral form only)102-Trifluoperazine103-Trimipramine104-Tropicamide(eye drops)105-Venlafaxine106-Vortioxetine107-Ziprasidone108-Zuclopenthixol109-
